debug_info.goal:
case cons.cons
a : Type
sl : SymList a
b : a
bs : List a
n : a
ns : List a
h₁ :
  ((b :: bs).isEmpty = true → (n :: ns).isEmpty = true ∨ (n :: ns).length = 1) ∧
    ((n :: ns).isEmpty = true → (b :: bs).isEmpty = true ∨ (b :: bs).length = 1)
h : { lhs := b :: bs, rhs := n :: ns, ok := h₁ } ≠ nil
ih₁ :
  ∀ (h₁ : bs = [] → ns = []),
    ¬{ lhs := bs, rhs := n :: ns, ok := ⋯ } = nil →
      lengthSL (Chapter3.SymList.initSL a { lhs := bs, rhs := n :: ns, ok := ⋯ }) <
        { lhs := bs, rhs := n :: ns, ok := ⋯ }.lengthSL
ih₂ :
  (∀ (h₁ : (bs = [] → ns = [] ∨ ns.length = 1) ∧ (ns = [] → bs = [] ∨ bs.length = 1)),
      ¬{ lhs := bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ } = nil →
        lengthSL (Chapter3.SymList.initSL a { lhs := bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ }) <
          { lhs := bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ }.lengthSL) →
    ∀ (h₁ : ns = [] → bs = []),
      ¬{ lhs := b :: bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ } = nil →
        lengthSL (Chapter3.SymList.initSL a { lhs := b :: bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ }) <
          { lhs := b :: bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ }.lengthSL
⊢ (if h : ns = [] then splitInTwoSL (b :: bs) else { lhs := b :: bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ }).lhs.length +
      (if h : ns = [] then splitInTwoSL (b :: bs) else { lhs := b :: bs, rhs := ns, ok := ⋯ }).rhs.length <
    bs.length + 1 + (ns.length + 1)

failed_attempts: · simp [lengthSL, initSL, hns, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm, Nat.lt_add_left, Nat.lt_add_right, Nat.lt_succ_self]

       exact Nat.lt_succ_self _
· simp [lengthSL, initSL, hns, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm, Nat.lt_add_left]

have : (List.length ns.tail : Nat) < List.length (n :: ns) := by
         cases ns with
         | nil => cases hns rfl
         | cons c cs => simp
       exact Nat.add_lt_add_left this _
· simp [lengthSL, initSL, hns, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm, Nat.lt_succ_self]

· simp [lengthSL, initSL, hns]
       exact Nat.lt_succ_self (bs.length + (ns.length + 1))

end SymList
· simp [lengthSL, initSL, hns, Nat.succ_lt_succ_iff, Nat.lt_add_left_iff_pos, Nat.succ_pos]
· simp [lengthSL, initSL, hns, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm, Nat.lt_add_left, Nat.lt_add_right]

· have : ns.isEmpty = false := by
         simpa [List.isEmpty, hns] using rfl
       simp [lengthSL, initSL, hns, this, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm, Nat.succ_lt_succ_iff]

· simp [lengthSL, initSL, hns]
